title: [MTR] THSR 700T
description: Taiwan High Speed Rail THSR 700T addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the THSR 700T from the Taiwan High Speed Rail to the game.

The train has 12 cars including a business-class car (#6).

Thanks to Han (Tommy9453) for the sounds!

**[Check out my other HSR packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

## Enjoy!

![THSR 700T](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1315b371b3d5edc8af01db2b9e1234acc4321b9.jpeg)
